column1: This survey demonstrates how to call the formr AI API from within a survey.
Enter any question or topic below and the language model will generate a short answer.
**Note:** The AI endpoint requires an OAuth access token. Contact your formr admin to enable this feature (`$settings['ai']['enabled'] = true`).",,,
text,user_topic,"What topic or question would you like to explore?","Type a question, e.g. »What causes stress?« or »Summarise attachment theory.«",,,
if (!prompt) { output.textContent = 'Please fill in the topic first.'
/* formr exposes the current OAuth token as window.formr_access_token */
body:    JSON.stringify({ access_token: token, prompt: 'Answer briefly: ' + prompt })
</script>","JavaScript calls POST /api/post/ai-complete with the current OAuth token.",!is.na(value('user_topic')),,
